title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
